name: The Chronicles of Dragon Wing - Reborn
short_description: This is a world in which sword and magic rule, an era of heroes that time will not forget, and a place where glorious victory in battle immortalizes you throughout time, and you are the author. Dragon Wing is for you to write, and write you will! Go, hero! Make it a magnificent and epic chapter!
detailed_description:
• PVP SRPG

    This unique PVP game makes you experience the charm of SRPG that you never meet before. With classic turn-basic mechanism, every move is worth consideration.

  • Game Map

    Maps are make up of hexagon terrains. Forest that let you dodge physic attack, Wind Rest Array that makes you move again, and Alchemy Array that can draw a card, all these different terrains are the key to succeed.

  • Hero

    There are tons of combination with heroes. Each hero, each skill can have reaction with others. Are you ready? Pick your hero and join a wonderful battle.

  • Equipment

    There three types of equipment: weapon, armor and accessory. At the beginning, players can get equipment with useful functionality. And you can get even more when you promote your progress.

  • Magical Card

    Magical card is the most use card except skill. There are over 30 types of magical card. Although your good fortune may not a decisive factor, a magical card can sometimes change your situation.

  • Multiplayer

    There are various modes in the game, Except the conventional 1V1 mode, we had prepared 3V3 mode. Call your friends and play together!

  • Story Mode

    Well-designed story mode levels, helps you learn the game better, and lead you to the myth of Dragon Wing continent.
